'''Pelagia's Moon''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] that had been converted from the bruised '''''Pelagia Star''''' that orbited the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Pelagon]].

==History==
The ''Pelagia Star'' was the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the Pelagian [[Navy/Legends|navy]] until the day the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] attacked [[Pelagon]]. It was a massive ship of an unknown and ancient design; during the attack even three [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] couldn't bring the vessel down. Ultimately, what was left of the massive vessel was converted into a space station and [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]], having been renamed Pelagia's Moon.<ref name="LE" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[House Pelagia]] was attempting to rebuild the station in order to use it as a warship again.<ref name="LE" />
